title: kubectl Usage Conventions — kubectl apply
text:
You can use
kubectl apply
to create or update resources. For more information about using kubectl apply to update resources, see
Kubectl Book
.

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
.
